title: The Names of Abu Bakr 's Wives
description: `Ali b. Muhammad-his informant and those of his authorities whom I have mentioned: In the Jahiliyyah, Abu Bakr married Qutaylah.762 (Al-Wagidi and al-Kalbi agree with him in that. All three say:) She is Qutaylah bt. `Abd al-`Uzza b. `Abd b. As`ad b. Jabir b. Malik b. Hisl b. `Amir b. Lu'ayy. She bore him `Abdallah763 and Asma'764 758. Of the same Qurashi clan as Abu Qul}ifah, she is reputed to have embraced Islam early and to have died before her husband. See Zubayri, Nasab, 294; Ibn Hajar, 1$dbah, IV, 447. 759. `Abdallih b. Lahi 'ah b.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 11
